code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of triples into a single fluent sentence.
    Uses natural‑language templates for known predicates and falls back to a generic form.
    All clauses are combined into one sentence.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Templates for predicates – {subj}, {obj} will be substituted
    templates = {
        "country": "{subj} is based in {obj}",
        "foundingDate": "{subj} was founded on {obj}",
        "industry": "{subj} operates in the {obj} industry",
        "city": "{subj} is located in {obj}",
        "netIncome": "{subj} reported a net income of ${obj}",
        "operatingIncome": "{subj} reported an operating income of ${obj}",
        "regionServed": "{subj} serves the {obj} region",
        "areaTotal": "{subj} covers a total area of {obj}",
        "leader": "{subj} is led by {obj}",
        "leaderTitle": "{obj} of {subj}",
        "populationDensity": "{subj} has a population density of {obj} per km²",
        "foundationPlace": "{subj} was founded in {obj}",
        "numberOfEmployees": "{subj} employs {obj} people",
        "numberOfLocations": "{subj} has {obj} locations",
        "service": "{subj} provides {obj} services",
        "type": "{subj} is a {obj}",
        "alternativeName": "{subj} is also known as {obj}",
        "birthDate": "{subj} was born on {obj}",
        "keyPerson": "{subj} has key person {obj}",
        "cost": "{subj} cost {obj}",
        "location": "{subj} is located in {obj}",
        "product": "{subj} produces {obj}",
        "subsidiary": "{subj} has subsidiary {obj}",
        "timeZone": "{subj} is in the {obj}",
        "isPartOf": "{subj} is part of {obj}",
        "parentCompany": "{subj} is owned by {obj}",
        "capital": "{subj} has capital {obj}",
        "motto": "{subj}'s motto is {obj}",
        "officialLanguage": "{subj} official language is {obj}",
        "leaderParty": "{subj} leader belongs to {obj}",
        "areaUrban": "{subj} has an urban area of {obj}",
        "part": "{subj} includes {obj}",
        "revenue": "{subj} generated revenue of {obj}",
        "ethnicGroup": "{subj} includes ethnic group {obj}",
        "governmentType": "{subj} has a government type of {obj}",
        "percentageOfAreaWater": "{subj} has {obj}% water area",
        "longName": "{subj} is officially known as {obj}",
        "populationTotal": "{subj} has a population of {obj}",
        "language": "{subj} speaks {obj}",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": "{subj} is at {obj} meters above sea level",
    }

    def render(triple: Triple) -> str:
        tmpl = templates.get(triple.predicate)
        if tmpl:
            # Simple placeholder substitution
            return tmpl.format(subj=triple.subject, obj=triple.object)
        # Fallback generic phrasing
        return f"{triple.subject} has {triple.predicate} {triple.object}"

    # Build clause for each triple preserving order
    clauses = [render(t) for t in triples]

    # Combine clauses into a single fluent sentence
    if len(clauses) == 1:
        sentence = clauses[0] + "."
    else:
        sentence = ", ".join(clauses[:-1]) + ", and " + clauses[-1] + "."

    return sentence

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END

  def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
      """
      Convert a list of triples into a single fluent sentence.
      Each triple is expressed as “<subject> has <predicate> <object>”.
      Multiple triples are concatenated with commas and an 'and' before the last one.
      """
      if not triples:
          return ""
  
      # Build simple clause for each triple
      clauses = [
          f"{t.subject} has {t.predicate} {t.object}"
          for t in triples
      ]
  
      # Join clauses into a single sentence
      if len(clauses) == 1:
          sentence = clauses[0] + "."
      else:
          sentence = ", ".join(clauses[:-1]) + ", and " + clauses[-1] + "."
  
      return sentence
